games.name: Unstrung
games.description: Cut words out of one long strand of letters — every cut splices in fresh thread, and a word that spans the seam scores triple.

games.name: Undercut
games.description: Race strategy with no driving — call the pit windows, read the weather, and beat the field on a decision.

games.name: Boxbox
games.description: Call the pit stop — read the telemetry and the driver's radio, fix what's broken, skip what isn't, and beat the clock.

games.name: Rootbound
games.description: A boardless hex duel: grow one shared colony that must never split, and ring your rival's Heartroot before they ring yours.

games.name: Sporeline
games.description: Maze tower-defence where your towers are the walls — fold the road longer to kill more, then send spores into a rival's field.

games.name: Lastlight
games.description: One generator holds back the cold — every building only works inside its shrinking ring of warmth.

games.name: Turntide
games.description: Draughts where a jump never kills — leap an enemy and it flips to your colour, so all 24 stones stay on the board.

games.name: Changeling
games.description: Real chess with one rule bolted on: capture a piece and yours turns into it, so your queen taking a pawn becomes a pawn.

games.name: Frostward
games.description: A cone of frost sweeps the board like a searchlight — bend the wind away from your hearths and it points at someone else.

games.name: Deepwatch
games.description: A silent co-op dive: surface a hand of deep-sea creatures in order with no numbers and no talking — all you know is who hasn't played yet.

games.name: Emberwake
games.description: Outrun a rising wall of dark in a neon lane-runner where your momentum is your speed, your life and your score all at once.

games.name: Scrapwall
games.description: Build a fort from scrap, then hold it — a co-op siege where the horde digs toward whatever wall you left weakest.

games.name: Tiny Tanks
games.description: Bank ricochet shots around the walls, steal the enemy flag, and race it home — a top-down capture-the-flag tank duel. Solo with bots or peer-to-peer with friends.

games.name: Grainfall
games.description: Rule a city-state one year at a time — split the grain, sow the fields, feed your people, and survive the harvests, rats and plagues that decide your reign.

games.name: Delvepack
games.description: Descend a monster-choked dungeon — clear each floor, grab an upgrade, dash to dodge, go deeper. Solo, or drop in a friend and revive each other.

games.name: Gloamrun
games.description: Descend the gloam together — a co-op dungeon crawl where you fight deeper floor by floor, revive each other, and see how far the dark lets you go.

games.name: Morsel
games.description: Eat the small ones, outrun the big ones — but catching anyone costs you the very mass you were winning with.

games.name: Driftlock
games.description: You never move a stone — you shift the row it stands on, and whatever slides into the rising Well is yours.

games.name: Windup
games.description: Program three moves, wind it up, and watch it all go wrong as the bots shove each other off the ripening cogs.

games.name: Bidstorm
games.description: Everyone holds the same thirteen cards — outbid your rivals for each prize, and never spend more than you had to.

games.name: Lumenlock
games.description: Flip mirrors to bend a beam through a prism, splitting white light into a rainbow, and lock every crystal in its own colour.

games.name: Nightwire
games.description: Hidden-role deduction where the clues are numbers: probe a seat to learn how many Ghosts sit in that window, and remember the Ghosts choose what they publish.

games.name: Orbital Skirmish
games.description: Thrust and slingshot around a lethal star that pulls ships, bullets and rocks alike, and be the last ship flying — solo against waves, or live with 2–4 friends.

games.name: Gravity Golf
games.description: Slingshot your ball through a field of planets and bend it around gravity into the hole.

games.name: Snake Royale
games.description: Classic snake in a shared arena — eat, grow and cut your rivals off; last snake slithering wins.

games.name: Rhythm Relay
games.description: Relay the beat down two lanes, tap in time to keep a shared combo alive, and take a lane each with a friend.

games.name: Hexbloom
games.description: Pick a colour to bloom your blob across the honeycomb and claim more tiles than your rivals.

games.name: Cipher Clash
games.description: Trace words on a shared letter grid and race to claim them before your rival does.
